posts.author: ryo (Ryosuke Aramaki)
posts.cookedHtml:
We have a couple of questions from our potential client.

Which events are logged?
What timestamp format is used?
Which fields are included in the log?
What format are these logs delivered? JSON is preferred.
Does this tool use SCIM or have an API for adding/removing users?
Please provide documentation for the SAML integration this product supports.
Please provide a point of contact for any technical support needed for the integration.

It would be great if you could give me an answer to these questions.
Thank you

posts.author: TRB-monday.com (Talia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @ryo, I would recommend writing in to support@monday.com so we can give you more targeted and customized support for your potential client there.

You may also think about asking these more technical questions in the technical/developers section of our community here: FAQs - GraphQL API - monday Community Forum.
